name: Closed-Won Lookalike Outbound
summary: Turn a best-customer closed-won cohort into a ready-to-contact outbound pipeline using Trellis primitives.

workflow.title: Pull closed-won deals
workflow.outcome: Fetch a seed account set from CRM.

workflow.title: Segment best customers
workflow.outcome: Reduce the seed set to the strongest cohort.

workflow.title: Find lookalike companies
workflow.outcome: Expand the best-customer cohort into net-new target accounts.

workflow.title: Identify personas
workflow.outcome: Find the right people at each account.

workflow.title: Deduplicate against CRM
workflow.outcome: Filter out already-worked accounts and contacts.

workflow.title: Upsert CRM pipeline
workflow.outcome: Write a tagged pipeline back into the CRM.

workflow.title: Hand off the ready queue
workflow.outcome: Review or hand off the pipeline before send.
